GWT0005ForwardsResumeState.description: State model derived from GWT0005ForwardsResume TLA+ spec

ResumeForwarded.message:
ResumeForwarded violation: (resumePresent /\ phase = "Complete") =>
        (sdkResumeSet = TRUE /\ sdkResume = RESUME_VALUE)
ResumeForwarded.description: Verifier for invariant ResumeForwarded from GWT0005ForwardsResume spec

ResumeAbsent.description: Verifier for invariant ResumeAbsent from GWT0005ForwardsResume spec

NoClobber.message:
NoClobber violation: phase = "Complete" =>
        /\ sdkCwd             = CWD_VALUE
        /\ sdkPermissionMode  = PERMISSION_MODE
     ...
NoClobber.description: Verifier for invariant NoClobber from GWT0005ForwardsResume spec

AllInvariants.description: Verifier for invariant AllInvariants from GWT0005ForwardsResume spec

assert_ResumeForwarded.condition:
(resumePresent and phase = "Complete") implies
        (sdkResumeSet = TRUE and sdkResume = RESUME_VALUE)
assert_ResumeForwarded.message:
Assertion failed: ResumeForwarded — (resumePresent /\ phase = "Complete") =>
        (sdkResumeSet = TRUE /\ sdkResume = RESUME_VALUE)
assert_ResumeForwarded.description: Test assertion for ResumeForwarded from GWT0005ForwardsResume spec

assert_ResumeAbsent.message:
Assertion failed: ResumeAbsent — (~resumePresent /\ phase = "Complete") =>
        sdkResumeSet = FALSE
assert_ResumeAbsent.description: Test assertion for ResumeAbsent from GWT0005ForwardsResume spec

assert_NoClobber.condition:
phase = "Complete" implies
        and sdkCwd             = CWD_VALUE
        and sdkPermissionMode  = PERMISSION_MODE
        and sdkAllowedTools    = ALLOWED_TOOLS
        and sdkDisallowedTools = DISALLOWED_TOOLS
        and sdkTools           = TOOLS_PRESET
        and sdkModel           = MODEL_VALUE
assert_NoClobber.message:
Assertion failed: NoClobber — phase = "Complete" =>
        /\ sdkCwd             = CWD_VALUE
        /\ sdkPermissionMode  = PERMISSION_MODE
     ...
assert_NoClobber.description: Test assertion for NoClobber from GWT0005ForwardsResume spec

assert_AllInvariants.message: Assertion failed: AllInvariants — ResumeForwarded /\ ResumeAbsent /\ NoClobber
assert_AllInvariants.description: Test assertion for AllInvariants from GWT0005ForwardsResume spec
